text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Watching the students go to and fro, I sometimes
feel the breath of a living gale.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
A spring squall... or a snow-sweeping breeze...
They circle, as a whirlwind amidst the calm.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Let your guard down for one moment, and it'll
sweep you off your feet...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Even so, if I set out with this as the forewind at
my stern, I have a feeling it will prove a most
favorable wind for me.
